Configured in verifier.py and mathematically sound for a 3.5m x 0.35m tapered cylinder (whose un-tapered bounding volume is ~0.337 m³).
Configured in verifier.py and mathematically sound for a 3.5m x 0.35m tapered cylinder with fins (bounding cylinder lateral area is ~3.85 m²).

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated UUV specifications injected via setup_task.sh. All geometric constraints (hull length 3.50m, hull diameter 0.35m, propeller diameter 0.25m) are explicitly matched in the text prompt instructions. The expected target ranges for Theoretical Volume ([0.20, 0.32] m³) and Wetted Area ([2.5, 4.0] m²) evaluated by verifier.py were verified to be geometrically valid and mathematically consistent for a tapered underwater vehicle bounding a 3.5m length and 0.35m diameter.
